posts.raw_content:
A microscopic demographic- Black males aged 14-35, a mere 2.7% of the U.S. population — perpetrates approximately 40% of all homicides. Blacks as a whole (~13-14% of population) commit 50-55% of known murders, dominate gun homicides, and rack up wildly disproportionate shares of robberies (~50-60%), aggravated assaults, carjackings, and property crimes per long-running FBI and BJS data. This isn’t “poverty” or “legacy of slavery.” It’s a persistent pattern of elevated violent criminality that turns cities into no-go zones, inflates national “gun violence” stats used as weapons to disarm law-abiding citizens, and erodes the social fabric for everyone else.
The 2022 Kia boys plague — packs of Black teens turning easy-to-steal cars into instruments of mayhem and viral clout — exposed the rot. Overwhelmed departments, terrified of “racism” accusations, flooded streets with Flock cameras instead of confronting the source. What started as a containment tool metastasized into an 80k-90k+ camera panopticon spanning 5,000+ communities, vacuuming billions of vehicle scans, building searchable life histories without warrants. Blue light surveillance towers, birthed in Black hellholes to babysit chaos, now infest suburbs and highways — blinking sentinels of a nation that surrendered.
Government, media, and elites enforce doublethink: the statistics exist, the bodies pile up, but uttering the racial truth brands you thoughtcriminal. Fear of the “racist” label paralyzes policy, censors data, and protects the dysfunction — 70%+ Black children born out of wedlock, cultures celebrating thugs, cognitive gaps unaddressed. Denial breeds explosion: more Black crime, more excuses, more surveillance. Privacy? Dead. Rights? Negotiable for safety. The Ministry of Truth calls it “equity.” Reality calls it the soft totalitarianism required to manage a demographic that refuses to assimilate to civilized norms.
The law-abiding majority pays the bill — stripped of privacy, firearms, mobility, and peace so the system can monitor and contain the endless Black-generated disorder. Flock, blue lights, data networks: this is the boot stamping on the human face, forever, because facing group reality was too “mean.” The grid tightens. Dissent is monitored. Freedom dissolves in the name of order the guilty refuse to provide. Data doesn’t lie. The ruin is demographic. The authoritarian endgame is inevitable simply because of the fear of being called “racist”.
